warm_up: Review top error from last session: vocabulary.
focus: Practise giving personal information in full sentences: 'Mein Name ist …', 'Ich möchte … machen', and time expressions with 'um' (e.g. 'um 19 Uhr', 'um halb acht') to avoid incomplete sentences in transactional conversations.
speaking_prompt: Call the restaurant to book a table for two for tomorrow evening at 7pm. Klaus answers. Confirm the reservation and ask if they need anything from you.
vocabulary_targets: um sieben Uhr / um halb acht
carry_forward_errors: Reservierung (was: Reservation) — session 2026-04-26 Persona: Klaus Scenario: restaurant_reservation Duration: 8 Mode: writing
oder (was: order) — session 2026-04-26 Persona: Klaus Scenario: restaurant_reservation Duration: 8 Mode: writing
